title: C++ compilation error when calling a class member accepting a virtual interface with a wrong interface type

features.name: virtual interface type parameter mismatch in class constructor
features.description: Code should include a class constructor accepting a virtual interface of one interface type while receiving a different interface type as argument

features.name: virtual interface passed to function expecting different interface type
features.description: Code should include a function or task accepting a virtual interface of one type but receiving an interface of a different type
